notes: Solid Pong implementation with AI, trail effects, bitmap digits, and audio; minor issue with ball not visible during SCORED state and score display overlap on title screen, but overall well-executed.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Pong with continuous collision detection, a predictive AI with fair error margins, authentic bitmap scoring, and Web Audio sound effects.
A solid and mostly complete Pong clone with working menus, AI, scoring, and pause flow, but it has some state/render quirks and non-classic polish issues that keep it well short of perfect.
